rule: Extend existing main/K-M capabilities before adding a parallel implementation.

items.capability: public scholarship list, search, and filters
items.reason: The user flow already exists; only the DB-backed projection boundary is missing.

items.capability: numeric scholarship detail and original source link
items.reason: Numeric verified scholarship detail already reads the public product table.
Storage and bookmark behavior exists; no second saved-item system is needed.

items.capability: normalized ingestion graph and append-only review
items.reason: Identity, occurrence, revision, review event, and effective decision semantics are established.
crawled_notices remains a transition compatibility surface and is not replaced in N-Q.
The existing read-only diagnostics page is the correct operations UI host.
A tested classifier exists; N-Q adds broader evidence instead of a replacement classifier.
The current schema exposes user/admin, so Reviewer, Operator, and Owner are responsibility assignments until production fingerprint and owner approval.
Only a hidden preview exists; an explicit idempotent non-production projector is the missing product boundary.

items.capability: production fingerprint and deterministic schema diff
items.reason: Historical sanitized evidence exists, but no current owner-gated production fingerprint or machine diff exists.
